emails.subject: Bridgeline Guaranty
emails.body: Bridgeline Guaranty Brant, The attached doc. contains Hess Energy Trading Company, LLC's comments to our guaranty form with our responses. Please forward as appropriate. I would be happy to discuss our comments with Hess if they so desire.

emails.subject: Bridgeline Guaranty
emails.body: Bridgeline Guaranty Brant, The attached doc. contains Hess Energy Trading Company, LLC's comments to our guaranty form with our responses. Please forward as appropriate. I would be happy to discuss our comments with Hess if they so desire.

emails.subject: Re: Bridgeline Guaranty
emails.body: Re: Bridgeline Guaranty Gerald, Here is their response to our comments. Not much but take a look: Under term7: Notices unless we include language similiar to...'Fax is acceptable as long as the fax is followed by hardcopy documentation and effective upon such hardcopy reciept.' Back to square one. They don't like fax. Under term 8: they are objecting to affiliate assignment. Successor is ok. Affiliate assignment is no good. They would like to take out the term assigns. that is it. brant

emails.subject: Re: Bridgeline Guaranty
emails.body: Re: Bridgeline Guaranty Gerald, Here is their response to our comments. emails.subject: Re: Bridgeline Guaranty
emails.body: Brant, The following are my responses; 1. We don't have a problem removing fax notice as long as they are willing to leave the required termination notice at 5 days. Since we can't fax notice, we will have to mail such notice which will take several days. 2. We can remove affiliate assignment. Sorry about the delay. Brant Reves 12/15/2000 10:22 AM

emails.subject: Re: Bridgeline Guaranty
emails.body: Hey Gerald, We are ready for execution copy. They accepted the lone remaining issue, Notice: Fax. Also, could you please delete the fax number referenced below the guarantor. Thanks brant
